sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturing process control plan for Portable X-ray (HnX-P1), document AM-PMCP-PT-001, revision 0.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Defines manufacturing process steps, materials, work content, inspection criteria, control cycle, records, and related standards for Portable X-ray (HnX-P1).
keyPoints: Revision number is 0 and revision date is 10/17/24.
Process steps include material receipt/preparation, incoming inspection, assembly, final product operation inspection, shipment inspection, and shipment.
Final product operation inspection requires X-ray exposure and product inspection under radiation safety management.
Inspection records include Run Sheet, 수입검사 성적서, and 출하검사성적서.

방사선 안전관리 준수하에

evidence.claim: The document title is Portable X-ray (HnX-P1) 제조 공정도.
evidence.pageTarget: Portable X-ray HnX-P1 Manufacturing Process Control Plan

evidence.claim: The model name is Portable X-ray (Hnx-P1).
Material receipt/preparation includes checking received quantity against purchase order quantity and checking material packaging condition.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 원,부자재 입고
1. 발주수량 대비
 입고량 확인
2. 자재 포장상태 확인

evidence.claim: Incoming inspection includes certificate review and external condition check.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 입고시 성적서 확인
• 외관 상태 확인

evidence.claim: Assembly #1 covers Top Cover Ass'y and uses electric screwdriver control at 5.7~7.6 kgf/cm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Assembly #1
 - Top Cover Ass'y
• 전동드라이버 관리
 [ 5.7~7.6kgf/cm)

evidence.claim: Assembly #3 covers TOP & Bottom mating and uses electric screwdriver control at 8.8~10.9 kgf/cm.
evidence.evidenceText:
• Assembly #3
 - TOP & Bottom 형합
• 전동드라이버 관리
 [ 8.8~10.9kgf/cm)

evidence.claim: Final product operation inspection includes display and operation state checks and performance by imaging condition using dose measurements.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 동작 검사
(Display상태,작동시 상태변경)
• 영상 촬영 조건별 성능상태
 - Dose 값별 측정

evidence.claim: Final product inspection is performed under radiation safety management with X-ray exposure and product inspection.
evidence.evidenceText:
방사선 안전관리 준수하에
X-ray 조사 및 제품 검사

evidence.claim: Shipment inspection includes exterior inspection, switch inspection, LCD defective pixel inspection, and packing.
evidence.evidenceText:
• 외관검사
• 스위치검사
• LCD 불량화소 검사
• Packing

evidence.claim: Shipment inspection acceptance criteria include no defective pixels and no abnormal operation for LCD inspection.
evidence.evidenceText:
• LCD 불량화소 검사
 - 불량화소 및 정상작동 이상 없을 것.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Source contains both revision date 10/17/24 and approval dates 10/16/24; documentDate uses the explicit 개정일 value.
Some text appears transcribed from a spreadsheet with repeated delimiters and minor OCR or extraction artifacts such as 'Tabk Ass'y'.
